title: Identity Verification
subtitle: Build trust in the community by verifying your details.
emailDesc: Your email is a core security element.
phoneDesc: Get a verified badge for better sales performance.
idDesc: Highest trust level. Requires document upload.
whyVerifyDesc: Verified accounts are 3x more likely to sell successfully. Buyers prefer profiles with a verified phone and identity badge as it ensures a safer marketplace experience.
selectDocType: Select the type of document you want to upload:
uploadFormats: JPEG, PNG or PDF up to 10MB
